llm_response:
# Vacation Request Approval

Dear Team Member, I am writing to formally acknowledge your recent request for vacation time, which you submitted through our internal portal. We have carefully reviewed your application and the current status of your project schedule to ensure a smooth transition during your absence. We value your contributions to the team and understand that rest is essential for maintaining high performance and well-being.

Unfortunately, we cannot approve your vacation request at this time due to critical deadlines approaching in the next few weeks. However, we are eager to discuss alternative dates that might work better for both your personal needs and our operational requirements. Please consider the following options when we meet next week:
*   Scheduling your leave for the week after the upcoming holiday break.
*   Splitting your requested time into two shorter periods later in the quarter.
*   Adjusting your start date to ensure all current tasks are fully completed before you depart.

To finalize the process, please confirm your preferred alternative dates by replying to this email or visiting [HR Policy Guidelines](https://example.com/hr-policies). Once we agree on a new schedule, your manager will update the system to reflect the change. We look forward to hearing from you soon and appreciate your flexibility in helping us meet our goals.
